[et_pb_section fb_built="1" theme_builder_area="post_content" module_id="msc-requirements" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default"][et_pb_row column_structure="3_5,2_5" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="3_5" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Before You Start

What You'll Need to Get Started

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Images & Show Artwork

High-resolution logos, professional headshots, and any specific branding graphics (layered .PSD or .AI files are preferred if available).

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Thumbnails

Eye-catching, high-contrast images (1920 x 1080px) that clearly represent your episodes or categories at a glance.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Video and/or Audio Files

Direct download links (Dropbox/Drive) or hosted URLs (YouTube/Vimeo) for the primary media content you want featured on the site.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Domain Name

The registered web address (URL) you intend to use, along with the login credentials for your registrar (e.g., SiteGround or Spaceship).

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Hosting Account Access

Login credentials for your hosting provider (e.g., SiteGround, Cloudways). We recommend managed WordPress hosting for optimal performance.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="2_5" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_image src="/media/podcast.jpg" alt="What you need to get started" title_text="podcast.jpg" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content" show_in_lightbox="off" url_new_window="off" align="center" force_fullwidth="off" always_center_on_mobile="on"][/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
